calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-18-2009 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Apr-28-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: K. Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Timothy A. Canning, Esq. appeared with plaintiff, Omar Zayat, who was placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by defendant Gregory Duran.
Default was entered against defendant on December 19, 2008.
Doe defendants were dismissed on April 7, 2009.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff Omar Zayat, and against the Defaulted Defendant Gregory Duran as follows:

Damages/Principal - $61,159.88.
Prejudgment Interest - $6,115.99.
Attorney Fees - $3,400.00.
Costs - $434.45, for a total judgment in the amount of $71,110.32.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
